topics.query_en: Horspool's string matching algorithm shift table tutorial
topics.reason: Calculating the correct shift values for characters, especially those not in the pattern or repeating characters, is highly prone to off-by-one errors.

topics.query_en: Space-time tradeoff algorithms input enhancement examples
topics.reason: Abstractly deciding when and how to consume extra memory to precompute data and reduce execution time requires advanced algorithmic intuition.

topics.query_en: Comparison counting sort algorithm step by step
topics.reason: Mapping the counted frequencies to actual array indices while maintaining the stability of the sort involves confusing multi-step array transformations.

topics.reason: While the algorithm itself is simple, mathematically proving its O(n*m) worst-case time complexity with overlapping patterns confuses many beginners.
